name: Quick Pawn
description_short: Quick Pawn is a pawn shop in Harvey, LA offering collateral-based loans and buying/selling of merchandise near Westbank Expressway.
description_long:
Quick Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop located in Harvey, Louisiana, at 3201 Westbank Expressway near the intersection of Westbank Expressway and 2nd Avenue. The business is listed in the retail shopping and thrift stores category, indicating a brick-and-mortar retail presence serving the Harvey community. Pawn shops have historically provided short-term financial solutions for consumers with immediate cash needs by accepting personal property as collateral. Quick Pawn maintains regular business hours throughout the week to serve walk-in customers seeking pawn services. The company is accessible by phone at (504) 347-1180 for customer inquiries and service details.

Based on the available website information, Quick Pawn operates as a standard pawn shop, though specific details about their exact product offerings, loan terms, interest rates, or merchandise categories are not provided in the Yahoo Local listing. Customers can expect typical pawn shop services including accepting items of value as collateral for short-term loans and potentially buying or selling merchandise. The business maintains separate hours for Saturday (9:30 AM - 5:00 AM, note: 5:00 AM appears to be a data entry error) and is closed on Sundays, with regular weekday hours from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Monday through Friday.

Quick Pawn distinguishes itself through its location in Harvey, serving the Westbank area of the New Orleans metropolitan region. The business has a verifiable phone presence and listed physical address, suggesting an established local operation. However, without comprehensive website content, service descriptions, customer reviews, or detailed information about merchandise categories accepted, loan terms, or competitive advantages, it is difficult to identify specific differentiators from other pawn shops in the area.

This business listing provides minimal operational detail beyond contact information and hours. Consumers considering Quick Pawn should contact them directly to verify current services, acceptable collateral types, loan terms, interest rates, and any fees associated with pawn transactions. The business may be legitimate, but potential customers should request full disclosure of all terms before entering into any agreements.
pros: Convenient local location in Harvey near Westbank Expressway with established physical address
Accessible by phone at (504) 347-1180 for customer service inquiries
Extended weekday hours (9:00 AM - 6:00 PM Monday-Friday) accommodate working customers
Saturday hours available (9:30 AM opening) for customers unable to visit on weekdays
Established business with Yahoo Local listing and verifiable contact information
cons: Website provides no details on loan terms, interest rates, or fees associated with pawning
No information about types of merchandise accepted or valuation methods
Minimal online presence limits ability to research customer reviews or company reputation
Saturday hours appear to contain a data entry error (5:00 AM closing time is implausible)
No transparency regarding loan duration, renewal policies, or redemption terms
best_for: Harvey, LA residents needing immediate collateral-based loans
Customers seeking to buy or sell used merchandise or valuables locally
People with items of value who want quick cash without credit checks
diagnosis: Quick Pawn is suitable for Harvey-area residents needing quick cash via collateral-based loans, but the extremely limited online information means prospective customers should call directly to verify all loan terms, interest rates, acceptable merchandise categories, and policies before transacting. The absence of transparent fee disclosure and service details is a significant caveat for any consumer considering this business.
services: Pawn loans using personal property as collateral
Short-term cash advances secured by merchandise
Buying and selling of pawned merchandise
In-person customer service at physical location
